treatments.detail.implants.process: Comprehensive 3D CBCT imaging and digital treatment planning
Computer-guided implant placement with sub-millimeter precision
Custom crown fabrication and final aesthetic integration
treatments.detail.implants.features: Immediate loading protocols when clinically appropriate
Lifetime clinical warranty on implant success
treatments.detail.implants.benefits: Prevents jawbone resorption and facial collapse
Restores 100% natural bite force and function
Custom porcelain crowns with natural translucency
Maintains facial proportions and youthful appearance
treatments.detail.hollywood.benefits: Minimal biological impact on natural teeth
treatments.detail.ortho.whoNeedsIt.candi: Desire for a straighter, more confident smile
treatments.detail.ortho.benefits.list: Improved oral health and easier cleaning
Enhanced bite function and chewing efficiency
Reduced risk of dental problems and wear
treatments.detail.ortho.treatmentProcess: Personalized treatment plan with predicted results
treatments.detail.ortho.technology.featu: Clear aligner therapy with precise control
common.whatsappBase: Hello, I'm interested in learning more about your dental services
joinUs.form.dropCV: Drop your CV here or click to browse
partnership.hero.title: Partner With FeRa Clinic
partnership.hero.subtitle: Join our network of trusted partners and collaborate with a premium dental clinic in Istanbul. Together, we can provide exceptional dental care to international patients.
partnership.whoCanApply.title: Who Can Apply
partnership.whoCanApply.subtitle: We welcome applications from established professionals and organizations in the medical tourism and healthcare industry.
partnership.whoCanApply.agencies.title: Medical Tourism Agencies
partnership.whoCanApply.agencies.descrip: Established agencies coordinating international dental treatments and medical travel.
partnership.whoCanApply.coordinators.des: Healthcare professionals who facilitate patient care and treatment planning.
partnership.whoCanApply.consultants.desc: Independent consultants providing guidance on dental tourism and treatment options.
partnership.whoCanApply.influencers.desc: Content creators and influencers in healthcare, wellness, and dental tourism.
partnership.whoCanApply.referrals.title: Referral Partners
partnership.whoCanApply.referrals.descri: International partners who refer patients for premium dental care services.
partnership.whyPartner.title: Why Partner With FeRa Clinic
partnership.whyPartner.subtitle: Discover the benefits of partnering with a premium dental clinic committed to excellence and patient satisfaction.
partnership.whyPartner.premium.title: Premium Dental Care
partnership.whyPartner.premium.descripti: Access to world-class dental treatments and state-of-the-art facilities in Istanbul.
partnership.whyPartner.support.title: International Patient Support
partnership.whyPartner.support.descripti: Comprehensive support for international patients including travel coordination and translation.
partnership.whyPartner.location.title: Strategic Istanbul Location
partnership.whyPartner.location.descript: Premium location in Istanbul, bridging Europe and Asia for international patient access.
partnership.whyPartner.communication.des: Clear, honest communication and regular updates throughout the treatment journey.
partnership.whyPartner.coordination.desc: Tailored treatment coordination and personalized care for each referred patient.
partnership.whyPartner.reputation.title: Trusted Reputation
partnership.whyPartner.reputation.descri: Build your reputation by partnering with a trusted, premium dental clinic brand.
partnership.howItWorks.title: How It Works
partnership.howItWorks.subtitle: Our partnership process is designed to be transparent, efficient, and focused on building successful collaborations.
partnership.howItWorks.step1.title: Submit Partnership Request
partnership.howItWorks.step1.description: Complete our partnership application form with your details and collaboration interests.
partnership.howItWorks.step2.title: Our Team Reviews Your Profile
partnership.howItWorks.step2.description: Our partnership team carefully reviews your application and background for potential collaboration.
partnership.howItWorks.step3.title: We Contact You to Discuss Collaboration
partnership.howItWorks.step3.description: If there's a potential fit, we'll reach out to discuss partnership opportunities and next steps.
partnership.form.title: Partnership Application
partnership.form.subtitle: Ready to partner with us? Complete the form below and our partnership team will review your application.
partnership.form.companyNamePlaceholder: Enter your company or brand name
partnership.form.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your partnership proposal and collaboration interests...
partnership.form.successDesc: Thank you for your interest in partnering with FeRa Clinic. Our team will review your application and contact you within 3-5 business days.
